data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed). However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this workflow. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and claim lifecycle but do not address the specific need for the claim status workflow, indicating a clear gap in the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for claim status workflow
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the claim status workflow.
